findings.reason: Binary crate intentionally allows cargo_common_metadata; style guide needs policy for binary crates.
Moving 28 constants across 9 files into 3 new constants.rs files risks compile errors alongside 11 other concurrent findings.
All 5 items are structurally required to be pub because they appear in public interfaces.
Bevy Query invariant lifetimes prevent bundling queries into a struct; only non-query params were bundled.
Duration methods take &self but map passes ownership, so method references produce a type mismatch.
APP_NAME and GLOBAL_CONFIG_FILE could not be moved due to include!() in test harness breaking super::constants resolution.
Types are structurally exposed through pub NateroidSettings, narrowing causes E0446
Items are accessed from outside the parent module; narrowing to pub(super) breaks the build and struct fields/methods cannot be facade-exported.

Inherent methods on App split across child modules cannot be re-exported; fixing requires module hierarchy restructuring.
